description: Mike MacCana welcomes attendees to the developer stage at Breakpoint 2023, emphasizing the significance of building on Solana. He introduces upcoming talks on on-chain program security and the new web3js, highlighting the importance of these topics for developers. He also discusses community engagement, decentralized governance, and the interactive experiences available at the conference.
topic_summary: Kick-off of Breakpoint 2023 by Mike MacCana, focusing on Solana development, upcoming talks on program security and web3js, and community discussions on governance and engagement. [t=1:84] [t=54:98] [t=104:39]
